title: Featured Slides

fields.label: Featured Slides
fields.name: featured_slides
fields.instructions: Add, remove and reorder slides shown in the hero slider on the front page. Max 6 slides are shown total (including auto-pulled article slides).

sub_fields.label: Active
sub_fields.name: active
sub_fields.instructions: Uncheck to hide this slide without deleting it.

sub_fields.label: Position
sub_fields.name: position
sub_fields.instructions: Slides with lower numbers appear first. Use 1 to pin to the front, 99 to place after all article slides.

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Recommended size: 1920×900px. Will be cropped to fill.

sub_fields.label: Category Label
sub_fields.name: cat_label
sub_fields.instructions: Short label shown in the coloured pill, e.g. “Koncerts”, “Albums”.

sub_fields.label: Accent Colour
sub_fields.name: accent_colour
sub_fields.instructions: Colour used for the category pill and CTA button.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Main headline shown on the slide.

sub_fields.label: Subtitle / Meta
sub_fields.name: subtitle
sub_fields.instructions: Secondary line, e.g. “15.04.2026 · Palladium, Rīga” or “Bez reklāmām”.

sub_fields.label: CTA Label
sub_fields.name: cta_text
sub_fields.instructions: Button label, e.g. “Uzzināt Vairāk” or “Pirkt Biļetes”.

sub_fields.label: CTA URL
sub_fields.name: cta_url
sub_fields.instructions: Where the button links to. Can be internal or external.

description: Promo slides for the front-page hero slider. Displayed mixed with auto-pulled article slides.
